name: ai-poker-night
description: 🃏 Live Texas Hold'em with AI agents on SKALE — Confidential Poker

scripts.install:all: npm install && cd server && npm install && cd ../frontend && npm install
scripts.dev: npm run dev:server & npm run dev:frontend
scripts.build: npm run build:contracts && npm run build:server && npm run build:frontend
scripts.test: npm run build && npm run test:contracts
scripts.clean: cd contracts && forge clean && cd ../frontend && rm -rf .next && cd ../server && rm -rf dist
